summary: Iteration 95 - Document-to-Transaction Auto-Draft feature testing complete. Backend: 29/30 tests passed (1 skipped - no AP docs without drafts left). All auto-draft endpoints functional: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} creates drafts (AP_Invoice -> ap_intake_draft, Freight_Document -> po_draft, Shipping_Document -> po_draft), GET /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns automation action, duplicate prevention returns status=duplicate. Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel shows 'Draft Created' state with draft type label and ID, blocked docs correctly hide Create Draft button.

issues: Minor console warning about <tr>/<span> hydration - cosmetic only

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns 404 for non-existent document
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns 404 for document with no intelligence result
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns 422 for blocked document (automation_readiness != ready)
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns status=duplicate for document with existing draft
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} creates ap_intake_draft from AP_Invoice document
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} creates po_draft from Freight_Document
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} creates po_draft from Shipping_Document
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns 404 for document with no automation action
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} returns latest automation action for document
Backend: Intelligence result enriched with auto_draft_available, auto_draft_created, target_entity_type, target_entity_id
Backend: Review queue items show draft status and target_entity_id for items with drafts
Backend: Activity records created for auto-draft events (timeline shows draft creation)
Backend: Draft records stored in correct collections (ap_intake_drafts, po_drafts)
Backend: Draft records contain source_document_id and vendor/customer info from extracted fields
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel shows auto-draft section for ready documents
Frontend: Panel shows 'Draft Created' state with draft type label (AP Intake Draft, PO Draft)
Frontend: Panel displays draft ID (AP-DRAFT-*, PO-DRAFT-*)
Frontend: Copy Draft ID button (data-testid='copy-draft-id-btn') present
Frontend: Blocked documents correctly hide Create Draft button and auto-draft section
Backend: All iteration_94 tests still pass (process, review-queue, corrections, summary endpoints)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: Auto-draft service at /app/backend/services/document_intelligence_service.py (lines 599-984) - well-structured with DOC_TYPE_DRAFT_MAP, duplicate prevention via DuplicateDraftError, activity logging
Backend: Router at /app/backend/routers/document_intelligence.py - DuplicateDraftError returns HTTP 200 with status=duplicate (not 409) per spec
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js - proper handling of draft states (created, duplicate, existing), good use of data-testids
Frontend: DocumentReviewQueuePage.js - Create Draft buttons in queue actions column, draft ID badges for items with drafts

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 95 - Auto-Draft feature fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} (creates draft), GET /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} (gets automation action). Draft type mapping: AP_Invoice/invoice -> ap_intake_draft, Freight_Document/Shipping_Document/vendor_po_support -> po_draft, Sales_PO/customer_po -> sales_order_draft. Duplicate prevention returns status=duplicate (HTTP 200, not 409). Intelligence results enriched with auto_draft_available, auto_draft_created, target_entity_type, target_entity_id. Collections: document_intelligence_results, automation_actions, ap_intake_drafts, po_drafts, so_drafts, activities. Key data-testids: create-draft-btn, auto-draft-section, copy-draft-id-btn, create-draft-btn-{doc_id}.

behavior: Returns 404 if document not found or no intelligence result
Returns 200 with status=duplicate if draft already exists
On success: creates draft, stores automation_action, updates intelligence result, creates activity

features: Shows 'Create Draft' button when automation_readiness=ready and no draft exists
Shows 'Draft Created' state with draft type label and ID after creation
Shows duplicate message when draft already exists
Create Draft button in actions column (data-testid='create-draft-btn-{doc_id}')
Draft ID badge for items with existing drafts

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API (BC sandbox) operates in DEMO MODE. Email service is MOCKED (in-memory).
